name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Port Usage
notes: This Building Block triggers when outbound TCP traffic over the port 50050 is detected. This is the default port for communication with a Cobalt Strike Server.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Port Usage on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the destination is Remote
when the flow matches Destination Port is 50050
when the flow matches Protocol is TCP.tcp_ip
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Port Usage on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the destination is Remote
AND when the flow matches Destination Port is 50050
AND when the flow matches Protocol is TCP.tcp_ip
